Name: Beacon Dispatch
Description: Dispatches work to a remote Beacon worker node. The task pauses until the Beacon completes execution and reports results.

SettingsInputs.Name: RemoteCapability
SettingsInputs.Description: Required capability on the Beacon (e.g. Shell, FileSystem)

SettingsInputs.Name: RemoteAction
SettingsInputs.Description: Specific action within the capability (e.g. Execute, Read)

SettingsInputs.Name: Command
SettingsInputs.Description: Shell command to execute on the Beacon

SettingsInputs.Name: AffinityKey
SettingsInputs.Description: Key for worker affinity routing (same key → same Beacon)

SettingsInputs.Name: InputData
SettingsInputs.Description: JSON data to pass to the Beacon worker

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to write results on completion

StateOutputs.Name: StdOut
StateOutputs.Description: Standard output from the Beacon execution

StateOutputs.Name: ExitCode
StateOutputs.Description: Exit code of the remote command

StateOutputs.Name: BeaconID
StateOutputs.Description: ID of the Beacon that executed the work
